LAW AND MOTION, 301, DEFENDANT KEE TAM'S MOTION COMPELLING RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND INSPECTION DEMAND: OFF CALENDAR; TO BE RENOTICED IN THE DISCOVERY DEPARTMENT. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558

DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES AND INSPECTION DEMAND IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PLAINTIFFS' FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
